{{Quote|Bellek? I'm sorry about your farmstead...|[[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]], to Bellek|<ref name="Star Wars: The New Droid Army">''[[Star Wars: The New Droid Army]]''</ref>}}
'''Bellek''' was a [[Moisture farmer/Legends|moisture farmer]] on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] before and during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. [[Raala Ponchar]] was one of his employees.

==Biography==
In the first year of the Clone Wars [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy]] [[B1-series battle droid/Legends|battle droids]] destroyed his homestead and after the attack [[Tusken Raider/Legends|Tusken Raiders]] raided the ruins, killing most of the survivors. Bellek lost everything but his life. He directed [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] to [[Jabba's Palace/Legends|Jabba's Palace]] when he met the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] and asked for [[Raala Ponchar]].
